title: Obstruction-Aware Planner PASS: class 3 (forbidden) pruned before search — zero nodes expanded
_fixture_purpose: Canonical planner-correctness certificate for a forbidden target. The planner is asked to find a plan reaching arithmetic class 3 (mod 9). Before expanding any search node, it consults the [112] bridge: v_3(3)=1 → OBSTRUCTION_PRESENT. It correctly prunes the target immediately: pruned_before_search=true, nodes_expanded=0, plan_found=null. This is the correct obstruction-aware behavior. The cert validates that: (1) the obstruction verdict is correctly computed, (2) pruning happened before search, (3) zero nodes were wasted. Obstruction theory is not decorative — it actively governs search.

planner_behavior.prune_reason: Arithmetic obstruction test (via [112] bridge): v_3(3)=1, target class 3 is in the forbidden set {3,6} of the norm form f(b,e)=b^2+be-e^2 mod 9. No valid QA state can have arithmetic fingerprint 3. Search aborted before frontier expansion.

validation_checks.details: nodes_expanded=0; no search wasted on impossible target
plan_found=null; planner correctly refused to emit a plan
